category_sources: Official Microsoft GitHub README describes SARIF Tools as command-line tools and a Python library for SARIF files.

display_name_sources: Official Microsoft GitHub README heading uses SARIF Tools.
docs_sources: Official Microsoft GitHub repository README provides installation and usage documentation.

tags_sources: Official Microsoft GitHub repository describes SARIF files produced by code analysis tools.
